title: berkheya echinus
intro: Berkheya echinus, also known as the Gold Mallow, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Berkheya echinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Berkheya echinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments for its wound-healing and skin-soothing properties.
